questions.context_sentence: Do a class survey about sports.
questions.cn: 做关于体育运动的班级调查。
questions.hint: sp(视频)+ort(类似art艺术)：体育运动(sport)是一种可以在视频里播放的艺术。
questions.prompt: Do a class survey about ______. (提示: 体育运动)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.hint: j(家)+ump(阿姨)：阿姨回“家”时，高兴得“跳”(jump)了起来。
questions.prompt: Can you ______ high, Daming? (提示: 跳)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.hint: h(像梯子)+igh(元音组合)：顺着高高的梯子(h)往上爬，越爬越高(high)。
questions.prompt: Can you jump ______, Daming? (提示: 高高地)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.hint: f(飞)+ar(阿姨)：阿姨“飞”(f)到了很远(far)的地方。
questions.prompt: I can't jump very ______. (提示: 远)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.hint: 拟声词：ping和pong就是乒乓球击打桌面时发出的“乒”和“乓”的声音。
questions.prompt: Can you play ______? (提示: 乒乓球运动)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.hint: volley(齐击，截击)+ball(球)：排球运动需要球员在空中拦截拍击(volley)球(ball)。
questions.prompt: Can she play ______? (提示: 排球)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.meaning: 从一边到另一边; 穿过, 越过
questions.cn: 我可以跑步横穿加拿大。
questions.hint: a(一)+cross(十字路口)：穿过(across)一个十字路口。
questions.prompt: I can run ______ Canada. (提示: 穿过)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.hint: ho(猴)+pe(跑)：猴子向前跑，看到了活下去的希望(hope)。
questions.prompt: Run for ______. (提示: 希望)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: But I lose one leg because of cancer.
questions.cn: 但我因为癌症失去了一只腿。
questions.hint: lo(一零)+se(蛇)：抓到了一零只蛇，结果又不小心失去(lose)了。
questions.prompt: But I ______ one leg because of cancer. (提示: 失去)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: But I lose one leg because of cancer.
questions.cn: 但我因为癌症失去了一只腿。
questions.hint: be(是)+cause(原因)：因为(because)这就是原因(cause)。
questions.prompt: But I lose one leg ______ of cancer. (提示: 因为)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: But I lose one leg because of cancer.
questions.cn: 但我因为癌症失去了一只腿。
questions.hint: because(因为)后面加of，可以接具体的人(sb)或事物(sth)。
questions.prompt: But I lose one leg ______ cancer. (提示: 因为某事物)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: But I lose one leg because of cancer.
questions.cn: 但我因为癌症失去了一只腿。
questions.hint: can(能够)+cer(策)：能够用策略去战胜癌症(cancer)。
questions.prompt: But I lose one leg because of ______. (提示: 癌症)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: And I can get money for people!
questions.cn: 我可以为人们筹集资金！
questions.hint: mon(魔)+ey(眼睛)：金钱(money)就像魔法眼睛一样吸引人。
questions.prompt: And I can get ______ for people! (提示: 钱)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.hint: har(哈)+d(弟)：哈！弟弟遇到了一个很困难(hard)的难题。
questions.prompt: It's ______ for me. (提示: 困难的)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.meaning: 亲切的; 友好的; 善良的
questions.cn: 许多善良的人帮助了我。
questions.hint: k(开)+ind(印第安人)：热情的印第安人很善良(kind)。
questions.prompt: Many ______ people help me. (提示: 善良的)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: I keep running for five months.
questions.hint: ke(客)+ep(音频)：客人在继续(keep)播放音频。
questions.prompt: I ______ running for five months. (提示: 持续)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: I keep running for five months.
questions.hint: mon(星期一)+th(天)：一个月(month)里有很多个星期一。
questions.prompt: I keep running for five ______. (提示: 一个月)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: But I'm very ill. I can't run anymore.
questions.cn: 但我病得很重。我不能再跑了。
questions.hint: 生病(ill)时，躺在床上像一根面条(i)和两根筷子(ll)。
questions.prompt: But I'm very ______. I can't run anymore. (提示: 生病的)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Now many people do the Terry Fox Run every year.
questions.cn: 现在许多人每年都参加“特里·福克斯义跑”。
questions.hint: y(像树丫)+ear(耳朵)：大树长了一年(year)，树丫像耳朵一样多。
questions.prompt: Now many people do the Terry Fox Run every ______. (提示: 年)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Let's remember Terry with a run.
questions.cn: 让我们用义跑来纪念特里。
questions.hint: re(反复)+member(成员)：我们要记住并纪念(remember)团队中的每一个成员。
questions.prompt: Let's ______ Terry with a run. (提示: 纪念/记住)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.hint: fa(发)+il(生病)：考试失败(fail)了，急得都快要生病了。
questions.prompt: It's OK to ______. (提示: 失败)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.hint: gi(给)+ve(我们)：给予(give)我们力量。
questions.prompt: Don't ______ up! (提示: 给予/放弃的动词部分)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.hint: give(给予)+up(向上)：把努力向上交出去了，就是放弃(give up)。
questions.prompt: Don't ______! Never stop! (提示: 放弃)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.hint: ne(不)+ver(版本)：这个软件决不(never)会有第二个版本。
questions.prompt: Don't give up! ______ stop! (提示: 决不)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Work hard and try your best!
questions.cn: 努力奋斗，尽你最大的努力！
questions.hint: t(他)+ry(人)：尝试(try)去帮助他人。
questions.prompt: Work hard and ______ your best! (提示: 努力/尝试)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Work hard and try your best!
questions.cn: 努力奋斗，尽你最大的努力！
questions.hint: try(尝试)+your best(你的最好)：尽你最大的努力去尝试。
questions.prompt: Work hard and ______! (提示: 尽最大努力)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.hint: st(石头)+ar(阿姨)：阿姨站在石头上，像一位闪耀的明星(star)。
questions.prompt: Sports ______ (提示: 明星)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Find good sports players in your school. Talk about their abilities.
questions.cn: 找出你们学校擅长运动的选手。谈谈他们的能力。
questions.hint: abil(能干)+ity(名词后缀)：拥有展现才能的能力(ability)。
questions.prompt: Talk about their ______. (提示: 才能/能力)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.meaning: 运动员, 选手, 球员
questions.context_sentence: Find good sports players in your school.
questions.cn: 找出你们学校擅长运动的选手。
questions.hint: play(玩，比赛)+er(人)：参加比赛的人就是运动员(player).
questions.prompt: Find good sports ______ in your school. (提示: 运动员)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.hint: f(飞)+as(如)+t(天)：飞得像天一样快(fast)。
questions.prompt: Can you run ______? (提示: 快地)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.hint: sw(水)+im(我是)：我在水里，就是在游泳(swim)。
questions.prompt: Can you ______? (提示: 游泳)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.hint: w(我们)+ell(发音类似“艾尔”)：我们都觉得艾尔表现得很好(well)。
questions.prompt: Can Amy play ping-pong ______? (提示: 好地)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Come on, Terry! You can do it!
questions.hint: come(来)+on(在...上)：快跟上来，加油(come on)！

questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Come on, Terry! You can do it!
